favorites.description: Show All Off Your Favorites Product
favorites.addFavoritesHint: You can add products to favorites by clicking the heart icon
favorites.loginRequired: Please login to view your favorites

safety.title: Pickup and Return Instructions
safety.meetInPublic: Meet others only in public and crowded places like metro stations and malls.
safety.bringCompanion: Don't go alone to meet a seller or buyer, always make sure to bring someone with you.
safety.inspectProduct: Make sure to inspect the product thoroughly before renting it.
safety.noDelay: Make sure to return the product on time; a delay of more than 4 hours is counted as an additional half-day.
safety.returnPolicyCondition: Return the product exactly as you received it—clean, intact, and without any damage or missing parts.
safety.returnPhotoGuideline: To protect your rights, take photos of the product upon receiving and returning it in case any issues arise later.

documentationGuidelines.point1_main: Take photos or a video of the product within 24 hours of receiving it to secure your rights as {userRole}. It's preferable for them to be timestamped. You can use your smartphone, where the time and date are automatically recorded, or use dedicated apps like:
documentationGuidelines.point1_apps: Timestamp Camera for Android Timestamp Camera for iPhone
documentationGuidelines.point2: If the product has a primary function (like a blender or coffee machine), take a video clearly showing it in operation, so you have proof of its condition at the time of receipt.
documentationGuidelines.point3: Photograph the product's serial number (if available) to maintain clear documentation.
documentationGuidelines.point4: Ensure all accessories are included in the photos on the website.
documentationGuidelines.point5: Keep the purchase invoice and serial number as they are necessary when filing any claim.
documentationGuidelines.point6: Inspect the product thoroughly upon receipt. If you notice any damage or discrepancy from its original condition, document it with photos or video immediately within 24 hours.
documentationGuidelines.point7: If you do not receive the product on time or if it is damaged, file a complaint within 24 hours of the rental period ending.
documentationGuidelines.point8: Try to communicate with the lessor first to resolve the issue directly. If you cannot, our dedicated solutions team can mediate on your behalf.
documentationGuidelines.point9: Most of the time, resolving matters directly with the lessor is faster and easier, but if that's not possible, we are here to support you.

tabs.specsNote: We guarantee full product readiness before every rental.

page.notFoundDescription: The requested product is currently not available
page.rentDescription: Rent {description}... at the best prices in Saudi Arabia.
page.author: Estajer Team

rentalCost.heading: How much does it cost to rent {name}?
rentalCost.body1: The rental cost of {name} depends on several factors. Choose the right duration from the booking options above and you will automatically get the best available price.
rentalCost.body2: Whether you are looking to rent {name} in {city} for an event, company, or temporary project Estajer gives you full flexibility with no long-term commitment.

whyUs.heading: Why Do Customers Trust Our {category} Rental Service?
whyUs.subheading: We provide the best {category} rental experience in {city} and across the Kingdom

item1.title: Competitive Prices
item1.desc: Save compared to the cost of buying the full product

item2.title: Flexible Rental
item2.desc: Daily / Weekly / Monthly based on your needs

item5.title: Continuous Technical Support
item5.desc: Throughout the rental period without hassle

rentVsBuy.heading: Is Renting {name} Better Than Buying?
rentVsBuy.body: If you need {name} for a specific period or occasion in {city}, renting saves you thousands of riyals with no long-term commitments.

callout.title: Renting {name} = Full Flexibility Without Burdens
callout.desc: Enjoy the latest technology today without worrying about storage or maintenance

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions about renting {name} in {city}

faqs.question: Can I book on the same day?
faqs.answer: Yes, if {name} is available, it can be rented immediately on the same day. Send a booking request from the page and the lessor will contact you for confirmation quickly.

faqs.question: Can the rental period for {name} be extended?
faqs.answer: Yes, the rental period for {name} can be extended based on availability and in coordination with the lessor directly. It is recommended to contact at least one day before the end of the period.

faqs.question: Does the price include delivery within {city}?
faqs.answer: This depends on your location within {city} or nearby service areas. Some areas include free delivery and others may include a small fee. You can review the delivery area details on the page above.

faqs.question: Is {name} inspected before delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes, {name} is fully inspected before each rental to ensure its readiness and full performance, to guarantee the best user experience for you.

ctaBanner.heading: Book {name} Now and Save Your Time
ctaBanner.subheading: Enjoy a fast, safe, and reliable renting experience for {name} with Estajer.

mcpBanner.title: List Products Instantly using AI!
mcpBanner.description: Don't waste time filling out forms manually. Connect our Model Context Protocol (MCP) server to Claude or any compatible AI client to upload your products in seconds just by chatting.

mcpBanner.step2: 2. Start a chat and say: "I want to list a product on Estajer."
mcpBanner.step3: 3. Share your product details or upload images, and the AI will handle the rest!

request.description: Please fill in the following fields to request a product
request.editDescription: Please edit in the following fields.

paymentCompleted.title: Congratulations! Your order has been created successfully.
paymentCompleted.description: Your order has been created successfully and is awaiting approval from the lessor. You can now go to your dashboard to view your orders and track the status of your request.

paymentError.title: The order was not paid
paymentError.description: The order has not been paid, or an error occurred during payment. Please try again, or contact support if the issue persists.

paymentProcessing.title: Your Payment is Being Processed
paymentProcessing.description: Thank you for choosing bank transfer as your payment method. Your order has been created and is awaiting payment confirmation from the bank.
paymentProcessing.processingTimeDesc: Bank transfers typically take 3-4 business days to be verified and processed. Once your payment is confirmed, your order will be completed automatically.

introduction.title: Welcome to the Product Tour! 👋
introduction.description: Let us guide you through the rental process step by step. This quick tour will show you how to easily book and rent products on our platform.

productTitle.title: Product Name
productTitle.description: This is the name of the product available for rent. You can add it to your favorites by clicking the heart icon.

productImages.title: Product Images
productImages.description: View product images from different angles. Click on any image to view it in full size.

productDescription.title: Product Description
productDescription.description: Read the complete product details and specifications to learn more about it.

orderContainer.title: Order Form
orderContainer.description: Here you can complete the product booking process. Choose the quantity, and a suitable date.

quantity.title: Select Quantity
quantity.description: Specify how many units of this product you want to rent.

additionalServices.title: Additional Services
additionalServices.description: Add extra services and accessories to enhance your rental experience (if available).

bookingPackages.title: Select Package
bookingPackages.description: Choose a rental package that suits your needs.

packagesRangeDate.title: Select Date
packagesRangeDate.description: Select the start date for your package.

dateSelector.title: Date Selection
dateSelector.description: Choose the start and end dates for your rental period from the calendar. Booked dates will be unavailable.

costCalculation.title: Cost Calculation
costCalculation.description: View the complete cost breakdown including rental price, additional services, discounts, and tax.

bookingButton.title: Send Booking Request
bookingButton.description: When you're ready, click here to add the product to your cart and complete the booking process.

deliveryOptions.deliveryDescription: This product will be delivered to your location. The delivery cost will be calculated based on your address during checkout.
deliveryOptions.pickupDescription: This product is pickup only. You must go to the owner's location to pick up the product.

productLocation.title: Product Location
productLocation.description: View the product location on the map to see how close it is to you.

ownerInfo.title: Owner Information
ownerInfo.description: Get to know the owner and see their ratings from previous customers. You can visit their page to view their other products.

chatButton.title: Contact the Owner
chatButton.description: Communicate directly with the owner to ask any questions about the product.

page.title: Tasks Board
page.description: View and track all active tasks
page.subtitle: Browse all ongoing tasks and their progress

metadata.title: About Us - Estajer | Product Rental Platform in Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: Learn more about Estajer, Saudi Arabia's leading product rental platform for a safe, flexible, and affordable experience.

about.title: About Us?
about.description1: Enjoy the experience… without the cost of ownership
about.description2: The real value is in usage. Estajer gives you the flexibility of the "sharing economy" to try what's new and save money. Join the best rental platform in Saudi Arabia.

ourValues.title: Values & Impact
ourValues.description1: A sustainable environment… and a connected community
ourValues.description2: Our goal is not only saving money, but creating real impact through the "circular economy".

values.title: Environmental Protection
values.description: Reducing waste by promoting the reuse of items.

values.title: Reducing Burdens
values.description: Providing families with event essentials at the highest quality and lowest cost.

values.title: Efficient Consumption
values.description: Encouraging sharing instead of buying and storing.

incomeValue.title: Financial Return
incomeValue.description1: Your idle assets.. an additional income source
incomeValue.description2: Don't let your belongings lose their value in storage. Estajer opens a door for you to support the "gig economy" and increase your income easily.
reasons: Turn fixed assets into smart investments.
Contribute to empowering the national workforce.
Drive the wheel of innovation in the Saudi market.

vision2030.tagline: We strive to establish ourselves as the leading rental platform in Saudi Arabia, driving a bright economic future.

vision2030.description: We are expanding to be closest to you in (Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam) and all regions. We are proud to be a national model that embodies Saudi Vision 2030 in digital transformation.

faqs.question: When do features start after subscribing to the premium package?
faqs.answer: As soon as payment is completed successfully, all features of the premium package are activated immediately on your account.

faqs.question: What is the real difference between the growth package and a regular landlord?
faqs.answer: The growth package provides professional tools like a dedicated account manager, advanced performance reports, and priority in displaying products.

faqs.question: Do I need technical or design experience to create my store?
faqs.answer: Not at all. The Estajer interface is designed to be simple and easy to use, allowing you to upload products and set your identity with single clicks.

faqs.question: How does the dedicated account manager work? What exactly do they do?
faqs.answer: The dedicated account manager is an expert from our team who helps you optimize your store's performance and solve administrative challenges.

faqs.question: Can I cancel the subscription at any time? What happens after cancellation?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from the dashboard. Your store will remain available with basic free features.

faqs.question: How do you protect my customers' information and personal data?
faqs.answer: We adhere to the highest standards of digital security and data encryption to ensure the privacy of your information and your customers' data.

faqs.question: Is there technical support? How do I contact help if I need it?
faqs.answer: Certainly, our technical support team is available via live chat or email around the clock to answer all your inquiries.

items.question: When do features start after subscribing to the premium package?
items.answer: Activation is immediate upon completing the subscription. The reduced commission starts from the first new order, and your store moves to the homepage within one business day. You can start customization from the same moment. Your dedicated account manager will contact you as soon as possible to help you get started.

items.question: What is the real difference between the growth package and a regular landlord?
items.answer: The growth package provides a clearly lower commission, a complete store with your own identity, assistance from the Estajer team in adding products, a dedicated account manager, and a store fully optimized for search engines. In short: the growth package is for ambitious partners who want a strong brand and higher profits.

items.question: Do I need technical or design experience to create my store?
items.answer: Never, everything is simple and clear. The control panel is easy to use, and there are ready-made templates you can use directly. Most partners created their stores on the same day without any help, and the rest consulted the account manager for only a few minutes.

items.question: How does the dedicated account manager work? What exactly do they do?
items.answer: Your account manager helps you from the beginning in setting up your store and adding products, regularly monitors your performance, and suggests improvements to increase bookings. Your inquiries and issues have top priority, and they teach you how to use all the platform's tools in the best way.

items.question: Can I cancel the subscription at any time? What happens after the period ends?
items.answer: The subscription is non-cancelable and non-refundable. After the period ends, the commission will return to its previous rate, and your items will remain on the Estajer platform as a regular landlord, losing the premium features. However, your customers remain as they are, and ongoing orders complete normally.

items.question: How do you protect my customers' information and personal data?
items.answer: All data is encrypted with the latest technologies, and verification via National Access ensures the real identity of customers. We are committed to all data protection regulations in Saudi Arabia and are documented by the Ministry of Commerce. we never share any data with external parties.

items.question: Is there technical support? How do I contact help if I need it?
items.answer: Support is available via WhatsApp, email, and the help center which contains comprehensive videos and articles. Premium partners have direct contact with a personal account manager with priority in response and resolution.
